news.headline: NIP Group launches first MOBA game Re: Aetatis, open beta on Dec. 24, 2024. Accelerating growth in digital entertainment.
news.summary: In Shenzhen, China, on December 20, 2024, NIP Group Inc. (NASDAQ: NIPG), a prominent digital entertainment firm, is launching its inaugural MOBA game, Re: Aetatis. The innovative sci-fi mobile game is set to start its open beta testing phase on December 24, 2024. This release marks an exciting step forward in competitive gaming, offering players a glimpse into the future of gaming experiences.

news.headline: UBS Global Wealth Management expects the Fed to deliver a total of 50 bps in rate cuts in 2025 vs prior forecast of 100 bps.
VOZOL launching two new vaping products for UK and Europe in Dec 2024 after 6 years, aiming to cater to users' needs.
news.summary: In Shenzhen, China on December 20, 2024, VOZOL announced the launch of two new products aimed at delivering an outstanding vaping experience to consumers. With a six-year history of commitment to customer satisfaction, they introduced the ACE model, along with another product, to meet the varied needs of users. This move solidifies VOZOL's dedication to innovation and enhancing the vaping experience.

news.headline: VOZOL launched TPD-compliant 10,000 puff vape, Vista Plug, hitting UK/European market in Dec 2024. Standout features include - more puffs, more economical.
news.summary: In December 2024, VOZOL's newest innovation, the Vista Plug, has been launched in the UK and European markets. This product stands out for its focus on meeting the needs of consumers, offering enhanced puff capacity and improved cost-effectiveness.

news.headline: Microland named Leader in ISG Provider Lens 2024 for Multi Public Cloud Services in the U.S. #ManagedServices #Midmarket
news.summary: In Bengaluru, India, on December 20, 2024, Microland, a prominent global digital transformation company, proudly disclosed that it has achieved the esteemed status of being acknowledged as a Leader in Managed Services catering to the Midmarket sector in the U.S. for the year 2024 as per the ISG Provider Lens™ Study on Multi Public Cloud Services. This recognition underscores Microland's exceptional competency in providing managed services and further solidifies its position in the market.

news.headline: Italian Industrial Sales MoM Actual 0.5% (Forecast -, Previous -0.3%)
Spencer Raymond named CFO at Chirisa Technology Parks for financing and operations. Update released on Dec. 20, 2024.
news.summary: Spencer Raymond is set to start working at Chirisa Technology Parks, where he will assist in financing, financial management, and operations to aid CTP in rapidly providing cutting-edge facilities for hyperscale, HPC, and AI clients. This partnership was announced in Richmond, Va. and Dublin on December 20, 2024.

news.headline: Prytime Medical makes advancements in REBOA to treat maternal hemorrhage, aiming to prevent deaths.
news.summary: In Boerne, Texas, on December 20, 2024, Prytime Medical, The REBOA Company™, revealed notable progress in enhancing maternal care this year. The company's efforts reflect a strong dedication to preventing maternal deaths due to excessive bleeding. Their advancements demonstrate a commitment to improving healthcare outcomes, with a focus on maternal well-being.

news.headline: Kremlin, on possible new G7 oil sanctions: We will act to counter any new move.
Copper, supported by Barclays, pulls out UK crypto license bid. 90% of yearly crypto license bids were rejected by UK FCA as of September 2024.
news.summary: As of September 2024, the UK Financial Conduct Authority reported a rejection rate of almost 90% for annual cryptocurrency license applications.

news.headline: Bell and Drum Towers in Beijing served as time-announcing facilities during Yuan, Ming, and Qing dynasties, symbolizing royal power.
news.summary: In Beijing, on December 20, 2024, it was highlighted that the Bell and Drum Towers served as time-announcing structures in the Yuan, Ming, and Qing dynasties, representing royal dignity and authority. Author Liu Xinwu described the Drum Tower with red walls and highlighted its historical significance. These structures have been standing since the 13th century, ranging from 1271 to 1911, showcasing the rich history and culture of China. The Drum Tower, in particular, is known for its striking red walls and traditional architectural elements, attracting numerous visitors annually.

news.headline: Scatec ASA board member buys 2,575 shares at NOK 77.1/share, now owns 13,615 shares in company.
news.summary: On 20 December 2024 in Oslo, Maria Moræus Hanssen, a board member of Scatec ASA, purchased 2,575 shares in the company at an average price of NOK 77.1 per share. Following this transaction, Hanssen now holds a total of 13,615 shares in Scatec ASA.

news.headline: Antaisolar releases first ESG report emphasizing sustainable development. Crucial step in commitment.
news.summary: Antaisolar, a leading provider of digital intelligent PV mounting system solutions based in Xiamen, China, released its inaugural Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) report on December 20, 2024. This move signifies a key advancement in the company's dedication to sustainable growth. The report highlights Antaisolar's efforts and achievements in areas related to the environment, social responsibility, and corporate governance. This publication underscores the company's commitment to transparency and accountability in its operations.

news.headline: China's Financial Regulator: We will extend transition period for solvency supervision rules of insurance firms by one year to end 2025.
$13.5B stablecoin supply locked in Ethereum layer 2 networks, raising total market cap to $205B.
news.summary: Over $13.5 billion worth of stablecoins are currently locked in Ethereum layer-2 networks, contributing to an increase in total market capitalization to $205 billion.

news.headline: By 2040, electric & hybrid cars to dominate, JETOUR to launch hybrid T2 model in response to market changes.
news.summary: In Shanghai on December 20, 2024, a report titled "Automotive Outlook 2040" released by Roland Berger emphasizes significant shifts in the automotive sector. The report projects that by the year 2040, pure electric vehicles and hybrid models will reign supreme in the market. In alignment with evolving consumer preferences and industry trends, JETOUR is set to introduce their hybrid T2 model. This move represents a strategic response to the anticipated dominance of electric and hybrid vehicles in the automotive market by 2040, as highlighted in the report by Roland Berger.

news.headline: North Korean hackers affiliated with Kim Jong Un stole $1.3 billion in cryptocurrencies in 2024, making up more than half of the total $2.2 billion stolen globally, as reported by Chainalysis. The cybercriminals posed as remote IT workers to infiltrate companies, emphasizing the need to address the growing threat.
news.summary: According to a recent report by research firm Chainalysis, Kim Jong Un's North Korean hackers have managed to steal an astonishing $1.3 billion in cryptocurrencies this year. This represents over half of the total $2.2 billion stolen globally. The cybercriminals have more than doubled their previous year's haul, highlighting the growing threat they pose. The report reveals that the hackers have been disguising themselves as remote IT workers to breach cryptocurrency and technology companies. This surge in cryptocurrency theft emphasizes the need for the industry to address the ever-changing threat landscape. The complete story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: US funding proposal unsuccessful, less than a day before shutdown with less than 24 hours left.
Peng Liyuan urges Macao students to embrace Chinese culture, contribute to national progress.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, Peng Liyuan, the spouse of Chinese President Xi Jinping, urged students in the Macao Special Administrative Region to enhance their knowledge of Chinese cultural history and actively participate in the growth of both the region and the nation. This call was made during her visit, aimed at promoting cultural awareness and development among students.

news.headline: Japan cuts view on corporate profits for first time since March 2023.
Treasury bills auction on Dec 20, 2024, yielded results.
Nordic Capital's Evolution II fund closes at EUR 2 billion, 65% larger than its predecessor, with strong demand from investors.
news.summary: The latest fund, Evolution II, has experienced robust interest from a diverse set of investors globally, leading to a significant increase of 65% in size compared to its predecessor. The high re-commitment rate and new commitments from limited partners have driven this growth. Nordic Capital's specialized focus on subsectors and its investment strategy in Northern Europe have proven attractive to investors. The fund continues to concentrate on the mid-market segment, reflecting a strong emphasis on...

news.headline: Japanese Government: The economy is recovering moderately though appears to be pausing in parts.
Prosus Chair's Trust sells shares worth €156 million for expanding hotel business.
Norwegian fund CEO shares benefits of podcast role in $1.8T fund.

Fed Chair Powell's hawkish stance may lead to 4 rate cuts in 2025, contrary to Fed's projection of 2 cuts. Markets react negatively. Louis Navellier criticizes Powell's commentary on inflation. Fed's inconsistency sparks concerns.
news.summary: Following Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell's hawkish commentary and a 25 basis points rate cut on Wednesday, the markets experienced consecutive slippages for two days. Despite the Fed's projection of only two additional 25 basis points cuts in 2025 according to their December dot plot, an analyst anticipates up to four rate cuts in the same year. Louis Navellier, Chairman and Founder of Navellier & Associates, criticized the market's reaction, stating that it undid all gains since the Presidential election. Powell's admission that the Fed's year-end inflation forecast had "kind of fallen apart" raised concerns. Navellier believes that the Fed might respond with a decrease in interest rates.

news.headline: Waaree Solar Americas Inc. achieves milestone with first solar module produced at Brookshire, Texas facility.
news.summary: In Brookshire, Texas, on December 20, 2024, Waaree Solar Americas Inc., a subsidiary of Waaree Energies Ltd., has successfully completed the trial-production of its inaugural solar module at its manufacturing plant. This achievement marks a key advancement for the company in the renewable energy sector.

news.headline: EliTe Solar begins construction on 5GW solar manufacturing hub in Egypt, furthering regional energy goals.
news.summary: In Suez, Egypt, on December 16, 2024, EliTe Solar, a prominent solar PV manufacturer based in Singapore, conducted a groundbreaking event for its upcoming project in the Egypt TEDA Suez Economic and Trade Cooperation Zone. This event signifies a significant achievement for the company as it establishes its presence in the region.

news.headline: TECO Electric & Machinery Co. recognized in DJSI for five consecutive years; ranked first in ESG evaluation.
news.summary: In Taipei on December 20, 2024, it was reported that TECO Electric & Machinery Co. has once again been recognized for its sustainability efforts. The company has been included in the 2024 Dow Jones Sustainability Index (DJSI) for the fifth year in a row, specifically in the Emerging Markets Index. TECO achieved the top position in the ESG evaluation, showcasing its commitment to environmental, social, and governance practices.

news.headline: Trump pushes for debt ceiling removal as US faces shutdown threat | Dec 20, 2024.
news.summary: In a recent development, former President Trump is advocating for the elimination of the debt ceiling as the possibility of a US government shutdown looms. This statement comes on the heels of the Daybreak: Europe on December 20, 2024. Trump's push highlights the urgency surrounding this issue as the nation approaches a critical juncture. By urging the removal of the debt ceiling, Trump aims to address the impending financial crisis that could arise from a potential government shutdown. Stay tuned for further updates on this unfolding situation.

news.headline: China drafts rules on online platform companies tax info reports.
Vantage Markets and NEOM McLaren mark 3-year partnership with festive video in Port Vila, Vanuatu. Celebrating electric racing and climate action.
news.summary: In Port Vila, Vanuatu, on December 20, 2024, Vantage Markets and NEOM McLaren Electric Racing marked three years of collaboration by launching a celebratory video. The video commemorates the successful partnership with Vantage, highlighting the progress made in electric racing and environmental efforts.

news.headline: Socios.com partners with Idomoo for personalized holiday video campaign connecting fans with footballers on Dec. 23.
news.summary: A personalized video campaign powered by Idomoo and created by Socios.com is set to debut on December 23 in London. The campaign will feature star players delivering holiday well-wishes to fans.

news.headline: Deepcoin had a successful 2024 with impressive milestones in the global cryptocurrency market through innovative products and services, and strategic global expansion.
news.summary: In December 2024, Deepcoin, a company based in Seoul, South Korea, made significant progress in the global cryptocurrency sector. Throughout the year, Deepcoin stood out for its outstanding products, unique services, and well-planned international growth strategies. The company excelled in various areas, such as market positioning, meeting regulatory requirements, and offering innovative products. These achievements helped Deepcoin strengthen its presence in the highly competitive cryptocurrency market and gain recognition on a global scale.

news.headline: LG launches free audio streaming service, LG Radio+, offering podcasts & live stations to Smart TV users; accessible via LG's audio devices.
news.summary: LG Electronics has recently introduced LG Radio+, a platform that offers free access to a variety of popular podcasts and live stations for LG Smart TV users. The service is also available on LG's audio devices. Launched on Dec. 20, 2024, LG Radio+ is ad-supported and provides users with a wide range of content to enjoy.

news.headline: Zoomcar introduces Zoomcar Cabs in Bengaluru offering affordable car rentals with drivers, expanding their services.
news.summary: In Bengaluru, India, on December 20, 2024, Zoomcar Holdings, Inc. introduced Zoomcar Cabs as a trial service. This new initiative by India's major car-sharing platform offers commercial vehicles chauffeured by professional drivers in Bengaluru. Zoomcar aims to expand its services to cater to this emerging market segment. The company's stock trades on the NASDAQ under the symbol ZCAR.

news.headline: Possible alterations to FLSmidth & Co. A/S Board of Directors are under discussion. #BoardChanges #FLSmidth
InterDigital wins prestigious Fierce Network Innovation Award for groundbreaking AI technology.
news.summary: Last week, 245 new cases of COVID-19 were reported, bringing the total number of confirmed cases in the region to 5,320. Additionally, 12 more deaths were recorded, raising the death toll to 198. The number of recoveries also increased, with 150 individuals being discharged from hospitals. The government has issued a reminder to the public to continue following safety guidelines and precautions to prevent further spread of the virus.

news.headline: Italian Consumer Confidence Actual 96.3 (Forecast 97, Previous 96.6)
Italian Mfg Business Confidence Actual 85.8 (Forecast 86, Previous 86.5)
Macao SAR celebrates 25th anniversary of return to China with new government inauguration, marking new chapter of 'One Country, Two Systems'.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, in Beijing, China, the Macao Special Administrative Region (SAR) celebrated the 25th anniversary of Macao's return to China and the swearing-in ceremony of the sixth-term government. The event was filled with joyous energy as dignitaries and locals gathered to mark this significant milestone. The occasion highlighted the deep-rooted connection between Macao and the mainland, emphasizing unity and progress. The anniversary celebration showcased the achievements of the past 25 years and set the stage for continued growth and cooperation. The event was attended by a large number of officials, and it garnered widespread attention, attracting millions of viewers both locally and internationally.

news.headline: German Parliament passes energy law change to accommodate waiver of internal gas storage levy at intra-EU border points and virtual trading hubs.

GLJ Research CEO Gordon Johnson criticizes Bitcoin as 'worthless' echoing Charlie Munger, says BTC falling below $100,000 is 'purely speculative'. Bitcoin trades near $97,843. BlackRock and Fidelity criticized for profiting from trades fueling bubble.
news.summary: GLJ Research's CEO Gordon Johnson heightened his criticism of Bitcoin (BTC) on Thursday, echoing Berkshire Hathaway Inc.'s late Vice Chairman Charlie Munger's skepticism. He targeted major financial institutions for their involvement in the cryptocurrency markets and stated that Bitcoin is essentially worthless, with no use case or value. Johnson specifically called out BlackRock Inc. and Fidelity Investments for profiting from trading fees and contributing to what he believes is a speculative bubble. With Bitcoin trading near $97,843 and recently breaching the $100,000 mark, Johnson highlighted that crypto miners swiftly convert Bitcoin into traditional currency.

news.headline: Hithium debuts HeroES, an installation-free home microgrid system launched on December 12, 2024, in Beijing, China.
news.summary: In Beijing on December 12, 2024, Hithium introduced HeroES, its inaugural installation-free home microgrid system during the second Hithium Eco-Day. This system includes the smart storage module known as Storage series and the smart control module named SynergyBox.

news.headline: Earnings for CSP (NASDAQ:CSPI) and Winnebago Industries (NYSE:WGO) expected before market open on December 20, 2024.
news.summary: Two companies are set to report earnings before the bell today. CSP, trading on NASDAQ under the symbol CSPI, is anticipated to release their fourth-quarter earnings report. Meanwhile, Winnebago Industries, listed on the NYSE as WGO, is also expected to announce their financial results. For more detailed information, please visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Cryptopia exchange, initially owing $4.2M, distributes $225M to hack victims in December 2024, reported by Grant Thornton.
news.summary: At first, with debts of $4.2 million, Cryptopia's liquidator Grant Thornton provided at least $225 million in cryptocurrency to victims of the hack in December 2024.

news.headline: Nxera Pharma will present at the 43rd J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference on January 15, 2025, by the President and CEO.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, Nxera Pharma Co., Ltd., previously known as Sosei Group or Sosei Heptares, shared that their President and CEO, Chris Cargill, is set to speak at the 43rd Annual J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference on January 15, 2025, at 3:00 p.m. PST. Nxera is listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange under the symbol 4565.

news.headline: Europe struggles to respond to Trump's threat of tariffs unless they buy more U.S. energy. No strategy in place.
news.summary: The recently elected president has vowed to impose tariffs unless Europe increases its purchase of U.S. oil and gas. European authorities lack a defined plan to prevent a potential trade conflict.

news.headline: UK corporate chiefs reveal their wish list for government policy changes, including tax cuts and regulatory reforms.
Beijing Review highlights Macao SAR's growth in 25 years under Chinese President Xi Jinping's leadership on its 20th anniversary.
news.summary: On December 20, 2019, Chinese President Xi Jinping referenced an ancient proverb during his speech marking the 20th anniversary of Macao. He emphasized the importance of addressing all issues and fixing all flaws in governance. The event took place in Beijing.
